item.title: New Controversial Contact Sport Has Players Slamming into Each Other Full Force
item.description: Run Nation Championship (RNC) is a controversial contact sport that has two people colliding head-on with the purpose of knocking each other down. The...

item.title: Moya, ‘the World’s First Biomimetic Robot’ Emulates Human Features Down to Body Temperature
item.description: Chinese tech startup DroidUp recently unveiled the world's first AI-powered biomimetic humanoid robot capable of emulating human characteristics. The ...

item.title: Russian Startup Allegedly Uses Brain Implants to Turn Pigeons into Surveillance Drones
item.description: Russian neurotechnology company Neiry claims to have successfully turned pigeons into biodrones using implanted brain interfaces. The post Russian Sta...

item.title: 97-Year-Old Wins Right to Mary His Lover After Wining Lawsuit Against His Son
item.description: A Singapore court of law declared a 97-year-old man mentally fit, after his son tried to prevent him from marrying a woman he had been seeing for seve...

item.title: Russia’s ‘Penguin’ Camouflage Suits Become Laughing Stock of the Internet
item.description: Photos and videos of Russian troops wearing bizarre penguin-like camouflage suits before being neutralized by Ukrainian drones have been going viral o...
